pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting setup_task.sh, which dynamically injects an exercise with this exact name.
Verified via the wger.de public API (https://wger.de/api/v2/muscle/), which confirms 'Quadriceps femoris' (ID 10) is a standard valid muscle name.
Verified via the wger.de public API (https://wger.de/api/v2/muscle/), which confirms 'Gluteus maximus' (ID 8) is a standard valid muscle name.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected data where 'Landmine Reverse Lunge' is explicitly created via setup_task.sh. The expected primary muscle 'Quadriceps femoris' and secondary muscle 'Gluteus maximus' have been cross-referenced with the public wger API and confirmed as the exact correct Latin names used by the wger platform.
